title: Max's Mixtapes
description: 164 Cassette Tapes, crafting items, and a Blockman for all of your listening needs!
body:
Welcome to Max's Mixtapes! A mod that adds 164 cassette tapes with unique songs, sprites, and crafting! 

![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64edc9776e7d334d157a58cb9778e69a872e004c.png)


--=[ Credits ]=--

All functionality is done by M4X4.

All sprites are done by ThurmanOkami


Mod Logo/Banner made in Blender by Zen.

 

Everyone listed above has given approval of this mod being distributed onto CurseForge and/or other mod sites, and with approval of using their assets for this mod for global use.


 

None of the songs are ours, so here are the artists to all of the songs we use in the mod:
